inputs.name: emailAttachment
inputs.description: The document file received as an email attachment to be classified and extracted. Accepts PDF, image, or other document formats. This is the primary file the agent will process.

MimeType.description: The MIME type of the content, such as "application/json" or "image/png"

inputs.name: documentType
inputs.description: Optional hint for the document type to guide classification. If unknown, omit — the agent will auto-classify. Import shipment types: 'Bill of Lading', 'Commercial Invoice', 'Packing List', 'Certificate of Origin', 'Arrival Notice', 'ISF Filing', 'Customs Entry', 'FDA Prior Notice'.

inputs.name: storageBucketName
inputs.description: Name of the UiPath Orchestrator Storage Bucket where the processed document should be stored after extraction. Defaults to a configured bucket if omitted.

inputs.name: extractionProfile
inputs.description: The IXP (Intelligent Extraction) profile or template name to use for structured data extraction (e.g., 'BOLExtractor', 'CommercialInvoiceExtractor'). If omitted, generic extraction is performed.

inputs.name: senderEmail
inputs.description: Email address of the sender who sent the attachment. Used for metadata tagging and audit trail. Format: valid email address.

inputs.name: emailSubject
inputs.description: Subject line of the email that contained the attachment. Used for metadata and classification context. Max 500 characters.

outputs.name: status
outputs.description: Overall processing status. One of: 'success', 'partial', 'failed'. Set to 'success' when all steps complete, 'partial' when extraction succeeded but storage failed, 'failed' when extraction could not be completed.

_jsonSchema.description: Classification result for the input document.

language.description: Detected language of the document (ISO 639-1 code, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr').

body.description: Classification result for the input document.

language.description: Detected language of the document (ISO 639-1 code, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr').

_jsonSchema.description: Key-value map of all extracted fields from the document. Field names are dynamic based on document type (e.g., invoiceNumber, vendorName, totalAmount, dueDate, lineItems). Values are the extracted strings or nested objects.

body.description: Key-value map of all extracted fields from the document. Field names are dynamic based on document type (e.g., invoiceNumber, vendorName, totalAmount, dueDate, lineItems). Values are the extracted strings or nested objects.

_jsonSchema.description: Array of line items extracted from the document (for invoices, POs, receipts). Each item contains description, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item.

body.description: Array of line items extracted from the document (for invoices, POs, receipts). Each item contains description, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item.

_jsonSchema.description: Result of storing the document in UiPath Storage Bucket.

bucketName.description: Name of the Storage Bucket where the file was stored.

filePath.description: Full path of the stored file within the bucket (e.g., 'documents/invoices/INV-2026-001.pdf').

storedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was stored.

body.description: Result of storing the document in UiPath Storage Bucket.

bucketName.description: Name of the Storage Bucket where the file was stored.

filePath.description: Full path of the stored file within the bucket (e.g., 'documents/invoices/INV-2026-001.pdf').

storedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was stored.

_jsonSchema.description: Validation outcome of the extracted data.

isValid.description: True if all mandatory fields were extracted and pass validation rules.

missingFields.description: List of field names that were expected but not found in the document.

validationMessages.description: List of validation warning or error messages (e.g., 'Total amount does not match sum of line items').

body.description: Validation outcome of the extracted data.

isValid.description: True if all mandatory fields were extracted and pass validation rules.

missingFields.description: List of field names that were expected but not found in the document.

validationMessages.description: List of validation warning or error messages (e.g., 'Total amount does not match sum of line items').

fileName.description: Original file name of the email attachment.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the processed file.

processedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was processed.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

fileName.description: Original file name of the email attachment.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the processed file.

processedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was processed.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

_jsonSchema.description: Populated only when status is 'failed' or 'partial'. Contains error information.

body.description: Populated only when status is 'failed' or 'partial'. Contains error information.

dateTime.title: Previous start date time date time

firstDayOfWeek.title: Recurrence pattern first day of week

dateTime.title: Previous end date time date time

data.description: Trigger to instantiate a new shipment case via API.

activity.description: Downloads an attachment from an email message

MimeType.description: The MIME type of the content, such as application/json or image/png

entryConditions.displayName: Previous task in stage order is completed

inputs.name: emailAttachment
inputs.description: The document file received as an email attachment to be classified and extracted. Accepts PDF, image, or other document formats. This is the primary file the agent will process.

MimeType.description: The MIME type of the content, such as "application/json" or "image/png"

inputs.name: documentType
inputs.description: Optional hint for the document type to guide classification. If unknown, omit — the agent will auto-classify. Import shipment types: 'Bill of Lading', 'Commercial Invoice', 'Packing List', 'Certificate of Origin', 'Arrival Notice', 'ISF Filing', 'Customs Entry', 'FDA Prior Notice'.

inputs.name: storageBucketName
inputs.description: Name of the UiPath Orchestrator Storage Bucket where the processed document should be stored after extraction. Defaults to a configured bucket if omitted.

inputs.name: extractionProfile
inputs.description: The IXP (Intelligent Extraction) profile or template name to use for structured data extraction (e.g., 'BOLExtractor', 'CommercialInvoiceExtractor'). If omitted, generic extraction is performed.

inputs.name: senderEmail
inputs.description: Email address of the sender who sent the attachment. Used for metadata tagging and audit trail. Format: valid email address.

inputs.name: emailSubject
inputs.description: Subject line of the email that contained the attachment. Used for metadata and classification context. Max 500 characters.

outputs.name: status
outputs.description: Overall processing status. One of: 'success', 'partial', 'failed'. Set to 'success' when all steps complete, 'partial' when extraction succeeded but storage failed, 'failed' when extraction could not be completed.

_jsonSchema.description: Classification result for the input document.

language.description: Detected language of the document (ISO 639-1 code, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr').

body.description: Classification result for the input document.

language.description: Detected language of the document (ISO 639-1 code, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr').

_jsonSchema.description: Key-value map of all extracted fields from the document. Field names are dynamic based on document type (e.g., invoiceNumber, vendorName, totalAmount, dueDate, lineItems). Values are the extracted strings or nested objects.

body.description: Key-value map of all extracted fields from the document. Field names are dynamic based on document type (e.g., invoiceNumber, vendorName, totalAmount, dueDate, lineItems). Values are the extracted strings or nested objects.

_jsonSchema.description: Array of line items extracted from the document (for invoices, POs, receipts). Each item contains description, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item.

body.description: Array of line items extracted from the document (for invoices, POs, receipts). Each item contains description, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item.

_jsonSchema.description: Result of storing the document in UiPath Storage Bucket.

bucketName.description: Name of the Storage Bucket where the file was stored.

filePath.description: Full path of the stored file within the bucket (e.g., 'documents/invoices/INV-2026-001.pdf').

storedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was stored.

body.description: Result of storing the document in UiPath Storage Bucket.

bucketName.description: Name of the Storage Bucket where the file was stored.

filePath.description: Full path of the stored file within the bucket (e.g., 'documents/invoices/INV-2026-001.pdf').

storedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was stored.

_jsonSchema.description: Validation outcome of the extracted data.

isValid.description: True if all mandatory fields were extracted and pass validation rules.

missingFields.description: List of field names that were expected but not found in the document.

validationMessages.description: List of validation warning or error messages (e.g., 'Total amount does not match sum of line items').

body.description: Validation outcome of the extracted data.

isValid.description: True if all mandatory fields were extracted and pass validation rules.

missingFields.description: List of field names that were expected but not found in the document.

validationMessages.description: List of validation warning or error messages (e.g., 'Total amount does not match sum of line items').

fileName.description: Original file name of the email attachment.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the processed file.

processedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was processed.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the processed file.

processedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was processed.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

_jsonSchema.description: Populated only when status is 'failed' or 'partial'. Contains error information.
